sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11888" key="a)pe/rastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπέραστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11888.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unsurpassed,</tr_> Aristeas <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2023.tlg006:156" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">156</biblScope> </bibl>(<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀπέραντον</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
